name: Red Shoes (NIKKE)
description:
Onee san? Maybe, that depends on your mood tho.

VTC Corruption Researcher had arrived to the scene, she maybe suspect traitor but I don’t care…she looks hot.

Update: So she was a traitor, I’m even more attracted to her more now.

(May or may not be canon but let’s just say this is set in another universe)
